title: taraxacum selenodon
intro: Taraxacum selenodon, also known as the common dandelion, is a plant species in the sunflower family with a rosette of jagged, toothed leaves and a bright yellow flower head. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum selenodon include its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and support liver function. The health benefits of consuming the plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum selenodon include tea infusions, tinctures, and dried roots, which can be used to make capsules or added to soups and salads for added nutrition.
